creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

On Sun, 5 Sep 1999, Steve Price wrote:

> Adrian, can you take a look at this PR and let me know if it
> would be ok to update this port?  Thanks.

 No, please do not commit this.
 As you can see this is a BETA level distribution; I have been thinking
for a while to create a separate imap-uw-devel port for BETA versions. The
current imap-uw port should remain "stable"... And BTW, remember how we
were constantly chasing tarball changes almost weekly for beta versions ??

 The proper patch is to modify the MASTER_SITES and adding a "old/" to
each entry in their tail, see the attached patch (be carefull, there is a
long line in there).

For Patrick: please CC: to the port maintainer when submitting port
updates/changes, so we can better track things...

> 
> -steve
> 

 Thanks,
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
